title: Tefkir Name. - Firdusi (Speaks).
content:
Oh world, with what baseness and guilt thou art rife!

    Thou nurtures, trainest, and illest the while.

    He only whom Allah doth bless with his smile
    Is train'd and is nurtured with riches and life.
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Tefkir Name. - Firdusi (Speaks)."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
